scenario: A care coordinator merges a patient registry with a call log to see which high-risk patients have been reached, joining by MRN and keeping all registry patients.
example_utterances: Merge the high-risk registry with the outreach calls.
Join on MRN, registry should be the main list.
Add last_call_date and call_outcome to each patient.
Some MRNs have two calls, keep the most recent.

scenario: A lab manager converts a wide daily lab volume sheet with separate columns per test type into a tidy long table, then designs an existing chart to highlight the top tests.
example_utterances: This sheet has one column per test, CBC, CMP, A1c.
Make it long, test_name and daily_count.
On the chart, highlight the top 3 tests in a darker color.
Rename the y-axis to Tests per day.

scenario: An apparel store owner needs to separate a combined 'Color-Size' column in their inventory master sheet into distinct fields to track stock levels by size.
example_utterances: split the variant column by the hyphen
break that field into color and size cols
use the dash to separate these values
divide the variant string into two new columns
diversity_axis: e-commerce store owners and product managers
